matrix_description: LLM-relevant cells only — BASELINE (LLM Class 1 default mode), C1_D1_LLM_ASSISTED (LLM Class 1 explicit), C2_D2_LLM_ASSISTED (LLM Class 2 candidate generation). All three exercise the LocalLlmAdapter, so temperature × top_p variations directly affect their results. C2_D2_STATIC_ONLY and other Class 2 cells where LLM is bypassed are intentionally excluded — they would just measure noise. Used by scripts/run_temp_sweep.sh to scan a temp × top_p grid.

cells.description: Default policy reference cell. Calls LLM for Class 1 candidate generation in default mode.
Class 1 intent recovery via LLM-assisted candidate generation (explicit experiment_mode=llm_assisted).

anchor_commits._purpose: Filled in by the orchestrator at sweep start.
